headline: Kognitos Included in Two Independent Gartner® Research Reports on the Future of Trustworthy AI
summary: Company Identified as a Vendor with Core Neurosymbolic AI Focus and Named as Sample Vendor for Context Graphs in the Gartner Hype Cycle™ for Agentic AI, 2026SAN JOSE, Calif., May 26, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Kognitos, the pioneer of neurosymbolic AI for business automation, today announced it has been recognized by Gartner, Inc. in two separate research publications. Kognitos is named among a group of vendors with a core focus on neurosymbolic AI (NSAI) in the April 2026 report “Investing in Neu
